title: beval Persona and Goal Libraries
description: Schema for persona library files and goal library files per spec/conversation-sim.spec.md §15.3 and §15.4.

personas.description: Array of persona definitions in this library file.

goals.description: Array of goal definitions in this library file.

id.description: Unique identifier within a library file. Used in ConversationCase identity.

description.description: Prose description passed verbatim to the simulator prompt. Should describe identity, background, and behavioral tendencies.

goals.description: Goal IDs this persona pursues. Must resolve against loaded goal definitions. At least one goal ID is required.

traits.description: Structured attributes for the simulator to embody.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for tagging and filtering.

PersonaTraits.description: Structured behavioral attributes of a persona.

tone.description: Communication tone, e.g. friendly, formal, skeptical, hostile.

expertise.description: Domain expertise level, e.g. beginner, intermediate, expert.

patience.description: Patience level, e.g. low, medium, high. Affects give-up threshold.

verbosity.description: Message verbosity, e.g. terse, medium, verbose.

language.description: BCP 47 language tag for the simulated user's language.

style_notes.description: Free-form additional style guidance for the simulator.

Goal.description: A conversation goal definition. Uses objective + evals structure where evals.query contains per-turn evaluation blocks and evals.conversation contains conversation-level evaluation blocks.

id.description: Unique identifier within a library file. Used in ConversationCase identity.

tags.description: Labels for filtering and categorization, same as Case tags.

objective.description: Prose description of what the simulated user is trying to accomplish. Passed verbatim to the simulator prompt and used as the assess_goal() basis.

evals.description: Evaluation blocks for per-turn (query) and conversation-level grading.

GoalEvals.description: Evaluation blocks containing per-turn and conversation-level evaluation stages.

query.description: Per-turn evaluation stages applied to TurnSubject after every agent response.

conversation.description: Conversation-level evaluation stages applied to ConversationSubject after conversation ends.

GoalStage.description: A when/then evaluation stage in a Goal.

when.description: Lifecycle hook label used as a stage name in results. Common values: 'each turn' (graders applied to TurnSubject after every agent response), 'on finish' (graders applied to ConversationSubject after conversation ends).

then.description: Criterion strings dispatched via the §4 grader registry by prefix matching, identical to static Case then clauses.
